description: Seal the GEOX TypeScript/Python integration gap: /geox/log_interpreter + /geox/contract bridge endpoints; geox_log_interpreter tool added to Python MCP via httpx async call to af-forge-bridge:7071; httpx>=0.25.0 added to geox requirements.txt

integration.note: geox/ is gitignored; Python MCP files updated in-place but not committed to af-forge repo
